languages.text: "Так я росла на древнем ксеномире биооружия? Нет, не может быть... А даже если и так — мы принесли Его поступь на Зарков, Ваша Светлость! Мы благочестивы, и в наших сердцах нет места ксеноереси!"

traits.locale_text: "Так я росла на древнем ксеномире биооружия? Нет, не может быть... А даже если и так — мы принесли Его поступь на Зарков, Ваша Светлость! Мы благочестивы, и в наших сердцах нет места ксеноереси!"

languages.text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"
languages.original_text: "Так я росла на древнем ксеномире биооружия? Нет, не может быть... А даже если и так — мы принесли Его поступь на Зарков, Ваша Светлость! Мы благочестивы, и в наших сердцах нет места ксеноереси!"

traits.locale_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

"So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

"So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

languages.text: 「つまり、私は生物兵器の古代の異星で育ったということか？いいえ、それはありえない…いいえ、ありえない。たとえそうだったとしても…我々はザルコフに彼の足跡を運びました、御{mf|御方|御嬢様}！我々は信仰に厚く、心には異星教の容赦はない！」
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、私は生物兵器の古代の異星で育ったということか？いいえ、それはありえない…いいえ、ありえない。たとえそうだったとしても…我々はザルコフに彼の足跡を運びました、御{mf|御方|御嬢様}！我々は信仰に厚く、心には異星教の容赦はない！」

languages.text: «Entonces, ¿he crecido en un antiguo mundo xenos de armas biológicas? No, es imposible... No, no. Y, aunque así fuera... ¡nosotros llevamos Sus pasos hasta Zarkov, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Somos devotos y no hay espacio para la xenoherejía en nuestros corazones!».
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, ¿he crecido en un antiguo mundo xenos de armas biológicas? No, es imposible... No, no. Y, aunque así fuera... ¡nosotros llevamos Sus pasos hasta Zarkov, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Somos devotos y no hay espacio para la xenoherejía en nuestros corazones!».

languages.text: “所以我是在一个满是生物武器的远古异形世界长大的？不，不可能……不，不。就算真是这样，我们也已经将神皇的足迹带到了扎尔科夫，大人！我们虔诚无瑕，心中绝容不下异端邪说！”
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: “所以我是在一个满是生物武器的远古异形世界长大的？不，不可能……不，不。就算真是这样，我们也已经将神皇的足迹带到了扎尔科夫，大人！我们虔诚无瑕，心中绝容不下异端邪说！”

languages.text: "Ich bin also auf einer alten Xenowelt voller Biowaffen aufgewachsen? Nein, das kann nicht sein ... Nein, nein. Und selbst wenn doch ... wir haben Seine Fußabdrücke nach Zarkov gebracht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir sind fromm, und in unseren Herzen ist kein Platz für Xeno-Ketzerei!"
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin also auf einer alten Xenowelt voller Biowaffen aufgewachsen? Nein, das kann nicht sein ... Nein, nein. Und selbst wenn doch ... wir haben Seine Fußabdrücke nach Zarkov gebracht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir sind fromm, und in unseren Herzen ist kein Platz für Xeno-Ketzerei!"

languages.text: "Yani ben kadim bir biyosilah zeno dünyasında mı büyüdüm? Hayır, bu olamaz... Hayır, hayır. Öyle olsa bile... Biz O'nun ayak izlerini Zarkov'a getirdik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Biz dindarız, kalbimizde zeno kâfirliğine yer yok!"
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Yani ben kadim bir biyosilah zeno dünyasında mı büyüdüm? Hayır, bu olamaz... Hayır, hayır. Öyle olsa bile... Biz O'nun ayak izlerini Zarkov'a getirdik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Biz dindarız, kalbimizde zeno kâfirliğine yer yok!"

languages.text: « Vous voulez dire que j'ai grandi sur une antique réserve d'armes biologiques xénos ? Non, c'est impossible... Non, non. Et même si ça l'était... Nous avons porté Sa volonté jusque sur Zarkov, votre Seigneurie ! Nous sommes pieux. La xénohérésie n'a pas sa place dans nos cœurs ! »
languages.original_text: "So I grew up on an ancient xenoworld of bioweapons? No, that can't be... No, no. And even if it were — we brought His footsteps to Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! We are pious, and in our hearts there is no room for xenoheresy!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous voulez dire que j'ai grandi sur une antique réserve d'armes biologiques xénos ? Non, c'est impossible... Non, non. Et même si ça l'était... Nous avons porté Sa volonté jusque sur Zarkov, votre Seigneurie ! Nous sommes pieux. La xénohérésie n'a pas sa place dans nos cœurs ! »
